items.scenario: You are a second-year student who just received your midterm essay grade in your sociology course. The professor's feedback was very brief, and you are unsure how to improve before the final paper, which is due in three weeks.
items.direction: Write an email to your professor. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the part of the feedback you found unclear
Ask what aspects of the essay need the most improvement
Mention that you would like to meet during office hours
items.subject: Question about my midterm essay feedback

items.scenario: You signed up for an advanced statistics course, but after the first lecture you realized it assumes knowledge from a prerequisite you have not taken. You want to switch into the introductory section before the add-drop deadline next Monday.
items.direction: Write an email to the course coordinator. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why the advanced section is not a good fit
Ask whether a spot is available in the introductory section
Provide your current schedule so a change can be arranged
items.subject: Switching to the introductory statistics section

items.scenario: You bought a three-month membership at a campus climbing gym, but the bouldering wall has been closed for repairs for two weeks with no reopening date posted. You feel you are not getting what you paid for.
items.direction: Write an email to the gym manager. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the problem with the closed bouldering wall
Ask when the wall is expected to reopen
Suggest a way to make up for the lost access
items.subject: Closed bouldering wall and my membership

items.scenario: You reserved a small studio at the community arts center for a weekend pottery workshop you are leading, but you just learned the room has no working sink, which the activity requires. The workshop is this Saturday.
items.direction: Write an email to the center's booking staff. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why a working sink is essential for the workshop
Ask whether a different room with a sink is available
Offer to adjust the start time if a room change requires it
items.subject: Studio needs a working sink for Saturday

items.scenario: You finished a summer internship at a design studio last week, and your supervisor mentioned there might be part-time openings during the school year. You would like to be considered if a position opens up.
items.direction: Write an email to your former supervisor. In your email, do the following:
goals: Mention what you valued most about the internship
Ask whether any part-time positions are likely to open
Explain how your class schedule would allow you to work
items.subject: Staying in touch about part-time work

items.scenario: The heating in your dormitory room has been producing only lukewarm air for the past week, and the nights have become very cold. You have not received a response to the maintenance ticket you filed online.
items.direction: Write an email to the residence hall manager. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the problem with the weak heating
Mention that an earlier maintenance request went unanswered
Ask for a time when someone can inspect the radiator
items.subject: Weak heating in my dorm room

items.scenario: A friend invited you to join a weekend hiking trip she is organizing, but the date overlaps with a family event you cannot miss. You still want to take part in a future trip the group plans.
items.direction: Write an email to your friend. In your email, do the following:
goals: Explain why you cannot join this particular trip
Ask when the group might plan its next outing
Suggest a trail you would enjoy exploring together
items.subject: Can't make this weekend's hike

items.scenario: You are the secretary of a campus photography club, and you want to book the lecture hall for a guest speaker event next month. You need to confirm the date and find out what equipment the room already provides.
items.direction: Write an email to the events office. In your email, do the following:
goals: Describe the event your club is planning
Ask whether the lecture hall is free on the proposed date
Explain what audiovisual equipment the speaker will need
items.subject: Booking the lecture hall for a guest speaker
